name: goof-proofs
description: Battle-tested portable agent skills and reference rules from real production work. v0.3 ships 29 auto-triggered skills covering Supabase, Next.js, iOS Safari, iCloud + git, LLM prompting, OpenRouter, skill authoring, computer-use MCP, and more — plus 5 reference rules for security baselines and project workflow. Claude Code can install the full bundle; Codex and similar tools can cherry-pick the SKILL.md folders and templates.
